testcase.name: SchemaValidation
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: testPostRequest
testcase.system-out: {"name":"Apple MacBook Pro 16","data":{"year":2019,"price":1849.99,"CPU model":"Intel Core i9","Hard disk size":"1 TB"}} {"id":"ff8081819cd4022c019cfa31f9aa38f6","name":"Apple MacBook Pro 16","createdAt":1773724105130,"data":{"year":2019,"price":1849.99,"CPU model":"Intel Core i9","Hard disk size":"1 TB"}}

testcase.name: testPostRequestWithPojo
testcase.system-out: Product ID: null sd.restassured.Product@7fc7152e ff8081819cd4022c019cfa32059e38f8 Apple MacBook Pro 16 Intel Core i9
